info.title: TheEyeBetaDataAPI
info.description: Internet-exposed AI Data API with allowlisted database access.

get.description: Return API and DB health status.

post.description: Issue service JWT using client credentials.

get.description: Get safe context payload for an external AI client.
Get safe context payload for an external AI client.
List columns for one readable theeyebeta table.
Return paged rows from one readable theeyebeta table.

post.description: Answer user question with constrained DB context.
Answer user question with constrained DB context.

get.description: Return latest signals with optional ticker filter.
Return admin audit events from orchestration tables.
Return all dashboard data as JSON.
Execute a server-side curated named query.
Return the list of available curated query names.
Return ETL job state for all registered jobs.
Return recent intraday price ticks for a ticker (admin only).
Serve the admin dashboard HTML page. Auth is handled client-side via token.
